name: Dialog.Simple
comment:
A simple theme for Elm Dialog.

@docs view, header, closeButton, body, footer

values.name: body
values.comment: Body decorator.

values.name: closeButton
values.comment: Close button with action.

values.name: footer
values.comment: Footer decorator.

values.name: header
values.comment: Header decorator, showing Close button if options.onClose is set.

values.name: view
values.comment: A simple decorator for the dialog, with backdrop. Put it at the bottom of your body.

name: Dialog

aliases.name: Options
aliases.comment:
Display and behaviour options (see showWithOptions):
* `duration` of the fade transition,
* `onClose`: what should be done when closing the modal. Set it to Nothing to prevent closing.

aliases.name: WithDialog
aliases.comment: Record extension that puts state in `dialog` field (see also [wrappedUpdate](#wrappedUpdate)).

values.name: actions
values.comment: Dialog actions signal: consumption required!

values.name: address
values.comment: Where to send your actions

values.name: closeOnClick
values.comment: On click, hide dialog.

values.name: closeThenDo
values.comment: Action builder for closing dialog send performing a task.

values.name: closeThenSend
values.comment: Action builder for closing dialog then sending an action to an address.

values.name: closeThenSendOnClick
values.comment: On click, hide dialog then send action.

values.name: display
values.comment: CSS display helper.

values.name: getContent
values.comment: Get current dialog content.

values.name: getOptions
values.comment: Get current dialog options

values.name: getTransition
values.comment: Get current transition state.

values.name: initial
values.comment: Empty, hidden state for model init.

values.name: isOpen
values.comment: Is the dialog currently open?

values.name: isVisible
values.comment: Visibility helper: either open, or transitionning to closed

values.name: opacity
values.comment: CSS opacity helper for fading effect.

values.name: open
values.comment: Action builder for opening dialog with default options and content.

values.name: openOnClick
values.comment: On click, fill and show up dialog with the provided content.

values.name: openWithOptions
values.comment: Action builder for open dialog with custom options and content.

values.name: openWithOptionsOnClick
values.comment: On click, fill and show up dialog with the provided options and content.

values.name: update
values.comment: Update dialog state. Takes effect duration in ms as first parameter.

values.name: updateContent
values.comment: Action builder for content update

values.name: wrappedUpdate
values.comment: Wrapped update for `WithDialog`, saves you a model field update and an Effects map.
values.type: (Action -> action) -> Action -> WithDialog model -> Response (WithDialog model) action
